case_title: VICTOR I. PEARCE VS. SARITA HUNDI KAMATH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VICTOR I. PEARCE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARCE, VICTOR I.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-15-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF VICTOR PEARCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SARITA KAMATH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARCE, VICTOR I. AS TO DEFENDANT KAMATH, SARITA HUNDI CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
